name: Cheesecake Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cup Graham cracker crumbs, approximately 18 squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cracker crumbs and melted butter. Press firmly into the bottom and up the sides of a 9-inch pie plate. Chill.
2. In a large bowl, blend the softened cream cheese, sugar, eggs, vanilla, and lemon juice until smooth.
3. Pour the mixture into the prepared crust. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 minutes.
4. Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, in a small bowl, combine the sour cream, additional sugar, and vanilla extract.
6. Spread the mixture over the cooled cheesecake filling. Return to the oven and bake an additional 5 minutes.
7. Allow the pie to cool to room temperature before refrigerating for at least 5 hours.
